prestazioni: Engine: 3.8L twin-turbocharged flat-six (engine code: MA1.71) upgraded with a **Ginettta G35-98HTA** turbocharger kit (hybrid turbos with billet compressor wheels, 64mm inducer, and 76mm exducer) paired with **Motec M150 ECU** for full standalone control, supporting 1.5 bar boost (stock: 1.2 bar) and **Methanolic M1 Methanol Injection** for charge cooling and detonation suppression. Includes **ARP Custom Main Stud Kit (200,000 PSI)** and **JE Forged Pistons (9.5:1 CR)** with **Pauter Billet Connecting Rods** for 800+ WHP reliability.

Exhaust: **Fabspeed Motorsport Valvetronic Extreme Quad-Tip Exhaust** with **Inconel 625 headers** and **Tial 44mm wastegates** (external, dual setup) for precise boost control. The system features **Akrapović titanium mufflers** and **X-pipe crossover** to optimize scavenging and reduce backpressure by 30% over stock.

Suspension & Handling: **Öhlins Road & Track DFV Coilovers (911 Turbo-specific valving)** with **Porsche Motorsport 992 GT3-derived front sway bar (24mm solid)** and **Bilstein B16 PSS10 dampers** for adaptive rebound/compression. **H&R Super Sport Springs (-30mm drop)** paired with **Porsche 992 GT3 Cup-spec front control arms** and **Tarett Engineering spherical bearing rear toe links** for sub-200ms response times in Sport+ mode.
estetica: Aero: **RWB (Rauh-Welt Begriff) 991.2 Widebody Kit** with **custom carbon fiber overfenders (30mm wider front, 40mm rear)** and **Vorsteiner GT-Spec front splitter** (992-based, 3D-scanned for cabriolet compatibility). **992 GT3 RS-style ducktail spoiler** in **dry carbon fiber (180g/m²)** with **Gurney flap** for -120kg downforce at 200 km/h. **Side skirts: TechArt GTstreet R body kit** with **integrated LED turn signals** and **diffuser: 992 Turbo S-spec with titanium exhaust outlets**.

Wheels: **BBS FI-R 9.5x20 ET40 (front) / 12.5x20 ET50 (rear)** in **Forgeline-style split-spoke design** with **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (255/30/20 front, 325/25/20 rear)**. **HRE FF01 forged wheels (gold brushed finish)** as a track-only alternative with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires**. **Brembo GT 6-piston calipers (992 GT3-spec)** with **380mm steel rotors (cross-drilled, slotted)** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for fade resistance.

Interior: **Recaro Pole Position CS-II seats (911-specific shell, Alcantara/leatherette)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses (FIA-approved)** and **roll cage: Matter Motorsport bolt-in 9-point cage (TIG-welded, chromoly steel)**. **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede)** with **Porsche PDK shifter paddles (carbon fiber, extended throw)**. **Motec C127 dash logger** integrated into the **Porsche PCM (992.1 unit)** with **custom CAN bus tuning** for real-time boost, AFR, and oil temp monitoring. **Full Alcantara headliner (black with red stitching)** and **custom door cards: TechArt GTstreet R (carbon fiber, Alcantara inserts)**.
